name: Second Wind
description: Regain hit points equal to 1d10 + your Fighter level. Once per short or long rest.

name: Cunning Action: Dash
description: You can Dash as a bonus action.

name: Cunning Action: Disengage
description: You can Disengage as a bonus action.

name: Cunning Action: Hide
description: You can Hide as a bonus action.

name: Sneak Attack
description: Once per turn, deal extra 1d6 damage when you hit with a finesse or ranged weapon and have advantage, or an ally is within 5 ft of the target.
